appDesc.message: Pinned tabs, done right: close confirmation, auto-restore of silently closed pinned tabs, mirroring across windows and snapshots.

notifMsg.message: A protected tab was closed without confirmation, so I brought it back. To close it for good: close it again within $1 s, unpin it, or turn the lock off in the popup.

hintAutoOff.message: Auto-protection of pinned tabs is off

noSnaps.message: No sets yet - save the current one.

statusSavedLocal.message: Set “$1” saved on this device ($2) - too big to sync

statusUndo.message: The previous set is in Autosaves

optShowIcon.message: Add 🔒 to the title of a protected tab

optRestoreNet.message: Restore a protected tab closed without confirmation

optRestoreNetHint.message: Chrome shows the “Leave site?” dialog only after you have interacted with the page. If a protected tab closed silently (page untouched, discarded from memory, chrome://) - the extension brings it back.

optMirror.message: Mirror pinned tabs across all windows

optMirrorHint.message: A new window gets a copy of every pinned tab; pinning, unpinning and closing are synced across windows. Incognito windows are left alone.

optAutoSnaps.message: Keep autosaves of the pinned set (last 10)

optAutoSnapsHint.message: Saved when a pinned tab is added, removed or navigates to a different page (query-string-only changes are ignored). Restorable from the popup - including after closing a whole window.

optNotify.message: Notify when a protected tab is brought back

notifReopenedPinned.message: Pinned tabs don't close. Unpin to close.

notifReopenedManual.message: This tab is locked. Unlock it in the popup to close.

splitTitle.description: Tooltip: tab is in a split view / set contains split pairs

pinnedProtectedTitle.description: Tooltip: this pinned tab is protected

supportHeader.description: Options: header of the voluntary-support section

supportHint.message: TruePin is free and always will be - nothing is locked. If it saves your tabs, you can chip in with a one-time voluntary contribution. As a thank-you, your name joins the SUPPORTERS list in the repository.
supportHint.description: Options: explains the contribution is voluntary, nothing is locked

supportThanks.description: Options: shown instead of the button once the user has contributed

supportList.message: Add me to the SUPPORTERS list
supportList.description: Options: link to get listed in SUPPORTERS.md

footerDonate.description: Tooltip for the popup footer heart button (donateBtn). Honest: TruePin is free; this is a voluntary thank-you, nothing is locked.

footerReview.description: Tooltip for the popup footer star button (reviewBtn) - opens the Chrome Web Store review page.

optTheme.description: Label for the theme select on the options page (#theme).

themeAuto.description: Theme select option value=auto - follow the OS/browser color scheme (default).

themeLight.description: Theme select option value=light - force the light token set.

themeDark.description: Theme select option value=dark - force the dark token set.
